{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220327415FEA0D0277D7DB66D558"}"},"total":1499},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7482220838298911550","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最喜欢里面的姜家设定，这就是家族天花板吧，没有大房二房争斗，也没有嫡庶之别，全家齐心协力一致对外，就是护短，尤其是姜二爷，为父为子为弟为臣都是最棒的存在，有颜有脑有心机。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742094214,"group_id":"7378708696282451006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9kCaWYvixV3p2fbfkwlKC0=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/388749a0d94d484db73994a7ae10c6ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709459&x-signature=NhZUlSWnbCHf99dMHqxLGFN2GTQ%3D","user_id":"108917926427","user_name":"一道通天的范副将"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108917926427","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7378708696282451006","book_info":{"abstract":"前世姜执月被继母哄骗，做了许多错事，恶名远扬，兄姐因她而亡，还背上谋害祖母的罪名。害她眼瞎口哑，四肢手脚筋挑断，最后心有不甘被人抛尸河中！而继母踩着她血亲的尸首，占据她母亲的国公夫人之位。
再睁眼，她回到了最开始的时候，这一次她手执长鞭，决心要抽死一切想要害她和家人的魑魅魍魉！
大小姐重生，通通闪开！
撕下继母伪善面具，拆穿绿茶女，踹走傻逼未婚夫作堆！保护祖母避开中毒，守着阿姐顺利生产，盯着阿兄婚事顺遂。
她正高兴呢，桀骜俊美宽肩窄腰的少将军忍不住了，掐着她的腰咬牙切齿问她，什么时候给他一个名分？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5fb35b382831eb32338d5ed4ab28783d","author":"去微","author_id":"","book_id":"7378708696282451006","book_name":"重生恶女守家：祖母阿姐我都要","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":492,"name":"将军","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=492&name=将军&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7378708783909831230","read_count":"29110","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1030514"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"501","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,重生,将军,打脸,大小姐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e7a9de3340dc32fca210d7e6ed30e8fb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779305261&x-signature=qRBb4DXDTZmfZ6kw9puUQQu8iI0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1443003456303911","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"598"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220327415FEA0D0277D7DB66D558"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读33小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":
